response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, there is minimal evidence of hands-on C++ development in the last 15+ years, with no mention of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role. His recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief early-career C++ mention at National Instruments, making him a poor fit for a senior C++ architecture role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems engineering experience across diverse domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver complex, scalable systems in distributed environments
concerns: No recent C++ or STL experience; core technical requirement not met
Lacks demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
No evidence of message brokers, multi-threaded C++ systems, or on-premises industrial platform development
